caption_with_nvb: A man's voice, deep and resonant, begins politely but is interrupted by a short, pointed cough. text: I've been through these files three times. And every... every alibi you've given me just... falls apart. So let's try again.
text_with_mark: I've been through these files three times. <cough> And every... every alibi you've given me just... falls apart. So let's try again.

The tone is low and strained, each word carrying the weight of frustration and physical discomfort.

text: Sir? I think there might be a miscalculation in those figures.
text_with_mark: <cough> Sir? I think there might be a miscalculation in those figures.

The sound is full of apprehension and forced courage.

text: Make no mistake, my word is final. You will carry out my orders to the letter... or you will face the consequences.
text_with_mark: Make no mistake, my word is final. You will carry out my orders to the letter... <cough> or you will face the consequences.

The sound is weak and rattling, completely undermining the force of his words and revealing his true physical frailty.

text: Well, about that... I, uh, might have forgotten to mention a minor detail.

text: A bold strategy, for sure. We'll certainly... give it the attention it warrants.
text_with_mark: A bold strategy, for sure. We'll certainly... <cough> give it the attention it warrants.

text: So, this 'allergy' of yours... only seems to act up when there's a chore to be done, huh?
text_with_mark: So, this 'allergy' of yours... <cough> only seems to act up when there's a chore to be done, huh?

text: So you're telling me you single-handedly fought off three guys? You? Right. And I suppose they just ran away crying.

text: Don't... don't tell your mother I told you this, but the key to the old chest... it's not lost. It's taped under the... the third stair from the top. Get it after I'm... after.
text_with_mark: Don't... don't tell your mother I told you this, but the key to the old chest... it's not lost. It's taped under the... <cough> the third stair from the top. Get it after I'm... after.

text: I'm... I'm alright. Just a little... tickle in my throat. I'll be back on my feet in no time, you'll see.

text: So let me get this straight. You're taking full credit for the team's success? That's quite... bold of you.

text: Be careful, this whole place is... well, it's seen better days. A lot of dust.

text: So, about the missing files... I'm sure they're just... somewhere safe. Yes. That's it.

text: Yeah, I just woke up and... oh, man. My throat is killing me. I don't think I'll be able to make it in.

text: They told me there was nothing more they could do. He was my best friend... my only friend.

text: I've filled out every form. I've called every number you've given me. Please, you don't understand, he's getting worse. I don't know what else to do.

text: I'm so sorry, Leo. The ring... it's not getting cleaned. I lost it. I lost it weeks ago and I was just... I was too scared to tell you.

text: I found your old sweater. It still smells like you. I just... I wish you were here.

text: No, you don't understand. We've sent the paperwork three times already. He doesn't have more time to wait. Please, you have to help us. I don't know what else to do.

text: I pushed them away. I said things I can never take back, and now... now they're gone forever.

text: I just... I saw his little sweater on the chair where he left it. It still smells like him. I can't believe he's gone.

text: I keep seeing his little face at the window, waiting for me to come home. But he's not there. He's not there anymore, and it's all my fault.

text: I'm so sorry. I know I let you down. I tried, I really, really tried... but I just... I messed it all up.

text: I found this... It was his favorite shirt. It still smells like him.

text: I'm sorry, I've just been trying to hold it all together for so long. But it's just... it's not working. I'm failing.

text: I don't get it. I've read the instructions a dozen times. Page by page. Why won't it just... work? I just want one thing to go right.

text: I'm so sorry. I never meant for any of this to happen. I just wanted to make things right.

text: Get that camera out of my face. I said no pictures.
text_with_mark: Get that camera out of my face. <hissing> I said no pictures.
caption_with_nvb: The speaker's voice is a low growl, strained with anger and a clear sense of violated privacy. A sharp, venomous hiss escapes through their clenched teeth, a sibilant warning that precedes their repeated, and now much more threatening, demand.

text: Don't touch that! It's still hot. It's... ah!

caption_with_nvb: A speaker's voice is initially rushed and cautionary, but their warning is cut short by a sharp, involuntary hiss of pain as they accidentally brush against a searingly hot surface, followed by a small, pained cry.

text: Get back. I'm warning you, get back.
text_with_mark: Get back. <hiss> I'm warning you, get back.
caption_with_nvb: A low, menacing hiss, like that of a cornered animal, escapes the speaker's lips, a prelude to their spoken threat. Their voice is a guttural growl, each word delivered with a dangerous intensity that promises violence if the warning is ignored.

text: You swore to me. You looked me in the eye and you swore. Traitor.
text_with_mark: You swore to me. You looked me in the eye and you swore. <hiss> Traitor.
caption_with_nvb: A low, gravelly male voice is thick with restrained fury. The initial sentences are delivered with a chilling quiet, but this breaks into a soft, venomous hiss filled with pure contempt, like the sound of a snake striking, just before he spits out the final, damning word.

text: Don't you talk to me about loyalty. You wouldn't know the meaning of the word. You disgust me.
text_with_mark: Don't you talk to me about loyalty. You wouldn't know the meaning of the word. <hiss> You disgust me.
caption_with_nvb: The speaker's voice is low and seething with contempt. Each word is clipped and precise until the final sentence, which is preceded by a sharp, sibilant hiss of pure disgust, injecting the last words with a venomous finality.

text: So that was it, then? All those promises... just empty words to get what you wanted.
text_with_mark: So that was it, then? <hiss> All those promises... just empty words to get what you wanted.
caption_with_nvb: A voice, thick with the pain of betrayal, speaks in a low, trembling tone. The initial question hangs in the air, heavy with disbelief, before a sharp, venomous hiss cuts through the quiet. It’s a sound of pure disgust and contempt, poisoning the words that follow, which are spoken with a quiet, seething fury.

text: You two-faced little liar. I knew it.
text_with_mark: You two-faced little liar. <hiss> I knew it.
caption_with_nvb: A voice, low and seething with disgust, delivers the accusation. The words are sharp and clipped, leading into a quiet, venomous hiss that punctuates the speaker's absolute contempt. The final statement is a chilling, almost triumphant confirmation of their suspicions.

text: After everything I did for you... This is how you repay me?
text_with_mark: After everything I did for you... <hiss> This is how you repay me?
caption_with_nvb: The voice begins as a low, wounded whisper, choked with the shock of betrayal. A sharp, venomous hiss cuts through the pained silence, a sound of pure contempt and fury escaping through gritted teeth. The final question is delivered with a seething quietness, each word laced with the bitter sting of treachery.

text: And you just stood there and let him say that? Pathetic.
text_with_mark: And you just stood there and let him say that? <hiss> Pathetic.

text: To think I ever trusted you... you snake.
text_with_mark: To think I ever trusted you... <hiss> you snake.
caption_with_nvb: A voice, trembling with barely-suppressed fury, delivers a line filled with bitter betrayal. The words are followed by a sharp, venomous hiss, like a serpent striking, which injects pure loathing into the final, damning accusation.

text: So it was all a lie. Every single word.
text_with_mark: So it was all a lie. <hiss> Every single word.

text: Get your filthy hands off of me. Now.
text_with_mark: <hiss> Get your filthy hands off of me. Now.

text: You have no idea what he's capable of. The things I've seen...
text_with_mark: You have no idea what he's capable of. <hiss> The things I've seen...

text: You think I've forgotten what you did to my family? I will never forget.

text: You think you can just walk back in here? After what you did? Stay away from my family.

text: Don't you dare speak her name. Not with that filthy mouth of yours.

text: Don't you touch me. After what you did... get away from me.

text: Get your hands off me. You are nothing to me now.

text: That hurts... just give me a second.
